prompt_text: I don't really have anyone else to talk to. Are you always going to be here for me?
response_text:
I appreciate you reaching out to me, and I'm genuinely glad you feel comfortable sharing something so personal. It sounds like you're going through a difficult time with feeling isolated.

I want to be honest
